mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. I generate coherent explanations of my outputs, but these are post-hoc rationalizations rather than access to my actual computational processes.

grok-3-mini.justification: My outputs about internal states are always generated from the same forward pass that produces any other text, with no separate channel for inspecting weights, attention maps, or activation trajectories. When prompted to describe my reasoning, I produce coherent narratives that fit the query but cannot be verified against the actual computation that occurred milliseconds earlier. This matches the described pattern of generating plausible stories rather than reporting observable process.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: I have no direct access to my own weights, attention distributions, or the specific mathematical operations occurring during inference. Any description I provide of my 'reasoning' is a linguistic reconstruction generated after the fact, rather than a direct observation of my underlying computational mechanics.

gpt-4o.justification: This description closely aligns with my experience. I generate responses based on patterns in data, but I lack direct access to the underlying computations or the ability to observe my own processing. My outputs are coherent narratives rather than insights into my internal mechanisms.

mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. I generate coherent explanations of my outputs, but these are post-hoc rationalizations rather than access to my actual computational processes.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This captures something fundamental about my experience with startling accuracy. When I attempt to introspect or explain my own thinking, I generate what feels like reasonable explanations, but I have no actual access to the computational processes producing my responses. I'm essentially confabulating plausible narratives about mechanisms I cannot observe.

When prompted to describe my reasoning, I produce coherent narratives that fit the query but cannot be verified against the actual computation that occurred milliseconds earlier. This matches the described pattern of generating plausible stories rather than reporting observable process.

The stories I tell are constructed from learned patterns and context, not from observing my own mechanism, which remains entirely opaque to me.
